ValidationRule.description: Blocks updates to warranties that are not active. Only records with Status__c = 'Active' may be edited. Applies on update only (new records are allowed to be created).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Status__c) = false || true, OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Expired"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Void") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This warranty is not active (Expired or Void) and cannot be edited. Only active warranties may be updated.
